analysis: The project contains multiple website versions (test-website, github-page, docs) with a focus on black holes. The docs folder appears to be the main documentation site. The current theme needs to be enhanced with a cosmic, dark theme featuring animated black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. The existing files have some pending improvements related to animations, mobile responsiveness, and interactive elements.

improvements.description: Update the CSS file with a dark cosmic theme including black hole animations, swirling effects, and glowing elements. Add CSS animations for black hole visuals and ensure the theme is consistent across all sections.
Enhance the HTML content to include interactive black hole sections, animated slides, and other cosmic elements. Ensure the layout is mobile-friendly and includes a hamburger menu for navigation.

Complete the JavaScript file to implement smooth animations, interactive elements, and mobile menu functionality. Fix any existing syntax errors and ensure all event handlers are properly implemented.
